title: App Settings - General - Privacy Policy
scenario: Privacy Policy page opens via Main Menu > General > Privacy Policy with close button in upper right corner
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Tap the Main Menu (hamburger icon) in the upper left corner.
Look for a close button (X) in the upper right corner of the Privacy Policy page.
Verify there is no back button (arrow) in the upper left corner.
expected: The Poly Privacy Policy page loads successfully. A close button (X) is present in the upper right corner. No back button (arrow) is present in the upper left corner.
